examples: They expect the antibiotic products to be exported to Southeast Asia and Africa.
He just handed me this pill, an antibiotic.
A new antibiotic requires only a three-day course of treatment.
Each year, tens of thousands of people die because they are infected with antibiotic-resistant bacteria.
The studies show that Zyvox was as well-tolerated and effective as vancomycin, a common hospital antibiotic.
